frontMatter.title: Deploying Compose Multiplatform Project in Netlify
frontMatter.summary: A brief note on how to deploy Compose Multiplatform project in Netlify

prev.title: Things I Keep Forgetting - Debugging Annotation Processor in Android Build
prev.summary: There's an error in your Android build and it points to your annotation processing code. But, you can't debug it. Here's how to do it.
